nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Cloudy. Low around 41, with temperatures rising to around 53 overnight. South wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Light Rain Likely then Light Snow Likely
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain showers before 8am, then rain likely between 8am and 5pm, then snow likely. Cloudy. High near 52, with temperatures falling to around 35 in the afternoon. West wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Snow then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of snow before 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Northwest wind 12 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
